titleStmt.title: SII 40.141: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 141. (A.R. No. B. 275 of 1931.) Telikicherla, Tadepalligudem Taluk, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On three sides of a Nandi pillar planted near the dhvajastaṁbha in front of the Prakaṭēsvarasvāmin temple.

Contains the eulogy of the family of a certain Nārāyaṇa-mantri of the Gautama-gōtra, who was the minister of the king. Records the construction of a temple gōpura, maṇḍapa and prākāra and also installation of a golden pinnacle to the Nārāyaṇēśa at Telikicheṟvu. Further it records the gift of land for conducting services in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīkāṁttādhipanābhisarōjātsurapatiprabhu
rabhavat . tadvaṁśē jani gautamamunirīśvara
pādayugaḷa kamala bhramaraḥ . tasminōttama gō
tē kāramicēdgrāmaśāsanasthōjātaḥ naṁddami
caturvvēdī tadvaṁśēmaṁtri bolla Iti vikhyā
Eṟakāṁbā nāgāṁbā tatprakhyāta sutō jagannu
ta caritaḥ . śrīmaṁtri sōmanākhyāstadbhāryyā
naṁggamāṁbikābudhavinutā . tābhyāmamātya
bollaśca goṁkō nārāyaṇassudhīḥ . maṁtri sūya
yyanākhyābhassaṁjātāssuguṇāsutāḥ tatra nā
rāyaṇāmātya suputraḥ kuladīpakaḥ . tatsudhī
goṁkkadhātrīśa pautrapsatyaparākramaḥ . śrī mada
yyapadēvasya satputrō gōtravarddanaḥ . manmagoṁkka
mahipālaḥ śauryya dhairyya guṇānvitaḥ tasmādamā
tya padavīmmahatīmavāpya nārāyaṇassakaladharmma
parāyaṇōyaṁ . nārāyaṇēśa śivaliṁgga varaprati
ṣṭhāṁ bhaktyākarōtkaraśarēśamitē śakābdē . śrī teliki
ṟvu nāma grāmē prāsādamacalatanayādhipatēḥ
Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyinamakarōtkailāsa sadṛ śa masadṛ
śa bhaktyā . Atilalita sudhādhavaḷi viditālaṁkā
raśōbhitē tarsmi śrīnārāyaṇamaṁtri prāsādēsva
rnnakalaśamatibhaktādāt . maṁṭapagōpura vipu
la prākārrā viprabhavasahita parivārāṁśca sitvāsthā
payadadhika prītyā nārāyaṇākhya sacivaśśa
ṁbhōḥ . tatra nārāyaṇēśvara pūjārtthaṁ gītavādyanṛtyā
dyartthaṁ gāyaka gaṇikā vāṁśika mārddaṁgikā sthāpita
parijanavarggā . tadbhṛ tyasthitinimittaṁ pratigṛhya
tu salilapūrvvakaṁ ggoṁkkanṛpāt . śrīnaṁddamūri nā
dgaprādānnārāyaṇākhya sacivaśśaṁbhōḥ
telikiceṟvu nāma grāmēpicagaṟve khaṁḍḍikā
mita bhūmiṁ dēvataṭāka samētāṁ prādānnā
rāyaṇākhya sacivaśśaṁbhōḥ . mudunūri raṭṭa
ḍi kamiha bhūtē śāyāṣṭabhōga saṁppetsahi
taṁ nārāyaṇa sacivōyaṁ śubhatara mācaṁ
dratāramasmiprādāt . śrīmaṁtri sōya naṁddana
nārāyaṇa maṁtriṇassuputrōtpattiṁ . Adikai
śvaryyaṁśaṁnnuddaryātsu śrībalāyurārōgyayu
taṁ . śrīmajjanārddana brahmanimitaṁ śivaśāsanaṁ
bhūyatkalpāṁtaraṁ sthāyi paṁccabhūtagaṇaissaha
nārāyaṇēśvara śrīmahādēvara pratiṣṭhācāryulu
kēśavapeddiṁgārikiṁ buṭṭeṁḍusēnu . Ī dēvaraku
kālamula nityamāneṁḍu nivēdyamulaku mūṁḍu pu
ṭṭusenu . sthānāpatulu ni pā gaṭṭuvaḍitamu mūga
maṭṭasēnu tirukāpunakuṁbuṭṭeṁḍu sēnu . Ī dēvaraku
samappiṁcenu
svadattaparadattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ
bahubhirvvasudhādattā bahubhiścānupālitā
yasya yasya yadābhūmi stasya tasya tadāphalaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 40.141 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
